name: Minecraft Java Server
description: Vanilla Minecraft Java Edition server with a selectable version, resolved via Mojang's official version manifest.

setupFiles.content:
# Generated by GameDock Manager. Setting this to true means you accept the Minecraft EULA (https://aka.ms/MinecraftEULA).
eula={{ACCEPT_EULA}}

# Generated by GameDock Manager. The server fills in all other settings on first start.
server-port={{GAME_PORT}}

variables.label: Minecraft version
variables.description: An exact version id (e.g. "1.21.4"), or "latest-release" / "latest-snapshot". Resolved against Mojang's official version manifest at install/update time - server downloads are only available for 1.2.5 and newer.

variables.label: Accept Minecraft EULA (true/false)
variables.description: The server only starts when set to true. https://aka.ms/MinecraftEULA

variables.label: Game port (TCP)
variables.description: Merged into server.properties at install and on Update files. Auto-adjusted at creation if another instance already uses it.

notes: The required JDK (e.g. Java 21 or newer for recent releases) is auto-detected from the selected version's Mojang metadata and downloaded automatically - no host Java install needed. To change the server version later: edit the Minecraft version field in Settings, then click Update files to download the new server.jar and re-resolve the matching JDK. You must set ACCEPT_EULA to true (accepting the Minecraft EULA) before the server will start.
